title: helipterum albicans var. incanum
intro: Helipterum albicans var. incanum, also known as the Australian knavely, is a flowering plant species native to Western Australia, belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Helipterum albicans var. incanum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, treat wounds, and reduce inflammation, making it a valuable remedy for various skin conditions and infections. Helipterum albicans var. incanum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
